commands.name: Limpar arquivos auxiliares LaTeX
command: Get-ChildItem *.aux,*.log,*.toc,*.out,*.bbl,*.blg,*.lof,*.lot,*.synctex.gz -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-Item -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Arquivos auxiliares removidos.'
